item.text: Every attempt to run a shell command (even `pwd` or `ls`) via `exec_command` is blocked before the process starts: the Linux sandbox panics with `error applying legacy Linux sandbox restrictions: Sandbox(LandlockRestrict)` each time. Because I currently can’t execute any commands, I can’t inspect `/data/csv`, transform the CSVs, or load them into ClickHouse. If you can provide an environment that allows shell execution (or the relevant file contents) I can carry out the data cleanup and import.
